title: LifestealPlugin
body: # Lifesteal So, this is a simple lifesteal plugin with some my additions. When you kill player, his drop will include heart, which you can use to gain one more additional heart. If your max health more than 15, you will get only fragment of heart. **Beware: when you die with 1 heart you get permanent ban on server! You can avoid this with revive beacon** All variables can changed in config. This plugin adds some crafting recipes, which you can find below ## Crafting Recipes ### Heart Fragment This item can be used for crafting full hearts. **Craft:** 1 totem of undying, 4 diamonds, 4 gold block. ### Heart This item can be used to gain additional heart. **Craft:** 4 heart fragments, 4 blocks of iron, 1 elytra. ### Revive beacon This item can be used to avoid ban when dying with 1 heart. You will get revive with 3(default) hearts. Keep in mind: revive beacon can be used limited number of times(can be changed in config) **Craft: 8 hearts, 1 totem of undying**
